calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-24-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a two minors.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288
Petitioner Ha Ying Tso (mother) was present in pro per as Guardian ad Litem for the minor Sum In To, and and with Cantonese Interpreter: Jena Zhang.
Petitioner and Interpreter was placed under oath and examined.
Minor's father - Kwong Ming To, deceased. Medical certificate of death was presented in open court.
Proof of Publication is in the file.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minor to Krystal Chen.
Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
